native_form.query: SELECT "source"."DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START" AS "DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START", "source"."DIALECT" AS "DIALECT", "source"."App Open Users" AS "App Open Users" FROM (SELECT TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("source"."DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START")) AS "DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START", "source"."DIALECT" AS "DIALECT", count(distinct CASE WHEN "source"."APP_OPEN_FLAG" = TRUE THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS "App Open Users" FROM (select * from ANALYTICS_PROD.DBT_VIZ.VIZ_RETENTION_M0_COHORT_BUCKET_MOVEMENT) AS "source" GROUP BY TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("source"."DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START")), "source"."DIALECT" ORDER BY TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("source"."DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START")) ASC, "source"."DIALECT" ASC) AS "source" WHERE CONTAINS(LOWER("source"."DIALECT"), ?) OR CONTAINS(LOWER("source"."DIALECT"), ?) OR CONTAINS(LOWER("source"."DIALECT"), ?) LIMIT 2000
